# Pumpkin Candle

**[STUB]** Wiki page is marked incomplete — verify numbers at source before relying on them.

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Ancient |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. Extinguishes (deactivates) at the start of Act 3.

## Notes

### Sources

Can be offered at the start of Act 2 by Tezcatara.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Stacks with other energy relics (Candelabra, Pyre card). With all three active in Act 2, T2 = 3+1(Candle)+1(Pyre)+2(Candelabra) = 7 energy.
- Best of the three Tezcatara options unless you have no Strikes (Nutritious Soup) or very high gold with low shop needs (Seal of Gold).
- Prefer this over Seal of Gold: free energy vs. draining gold needed for Act 2 shops.
